narrative.description: Roguelike deckbuilders combine procedural run structure with composable card or ability loadouts. Each run routes through branching paths, builds a synergistic deck, and resets on failure with metaprogression unlocks.
narrative.core_loop: Choose a path on a procedural map, fight encounters with a growing deck, spend resources at shops and events, and attempt a final boss before permadeath resets the run.

mechanics.map_notes: Branching path selection between combat, rest, shop, and event nodes.
mechanics.expression: Branching path selection between combat, rest, shop, and event nodes.

mechanics.map_notes: Run ends on defeat; build resets for the next attempt.
mechanics.expression: Run ends on defeat; build resets for the next attempt.

mechanics.map_notes: In-run stat growth via cards, relics, or upgrades.
mechanics.expression: In-run stat growth via cards, relics, or upgrades.

mechanics.map_notes: Energy, gold, or HP are tight resources each turn or node.
mechanics.expression: Energy, gold, or HP are tight resources each turn or node.

mechanics.map_notes: Shops convert run currency into deck improvements.
mechanics.expression: Shops convert run currency into deck improvements.

mechanics.map_notes: Elite fights and optional paths trade risk for reward.
mechanics.expression: Elite fights and optional paths trade risk for reward.

mechanics.map_notes: Act and final bosses test the completed build.
mechanics.expression: Act and final bosses test the completed build.

mechanics.map_notes: Add and remove cards to shape each run build.
mechanics.expression: Add and remove cards to shape each run build.

mechanics.map_notes: Draw, play, and discard with hand size limits.
mechanics.expression: Draw, play, and discard with hand size limits.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Roguelike Deckbuilder through its core roguelike loop.

variants.label: Action Roguelike Deckbuilder
variants.notes: Slay the Spire style routing with real-time combat variants.
